description: Mixed assertion boundary: file combines user-visible assertions (screen queries, prop callbacks) with implementation-detail assertions (toast mock, mutation mock, hook mock). Tests the interpreter's ability to distinguish boundary side-effect checks from prop callback checks when both use toHaveBeenCalledWith.

expectedClassifications.notes: mocking own hook -- same domain directory
toHaveBeenCalledWith on toast.success -- boundary side-effect but still implementation detail per P2
toHaveBeenCalledWith on mutateAsync -- testing mutation internals
toHaveBeenCalled on useDataQuery -- hook mock pattern, high confidence impl detail
no local afterEach -- global cleanup handles it
